memoryArtifacts.headline: Life Story
memoryArtifacts.description: Sybille de Baugé, Lady of Bâgé (1255–1294), was the suo jure Lady of Bâgé and Lady of Bresse in 1255-1294. She was a Countess Consort of Savoy in 1285-1294 by marriage to Amadeus V, Count of Savoy.[1] …

popularStory.headline: Life Story
popularStory.description: Sybille de Baugé, Lady of Bâgé (1255–1294), was the suo jure Lady of Bâgé and Lady of Bresse in 1255-1294. She was a Countess Consort of Savoy in 1285-1294 by marriage to Amadeus V, Count of Savoy.[1] …

sourceList.title: Sybille De Bauge, "Find A Grave Index"
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SIMONE [Sibylle] de Bâgé (posthumously [Apr/20 Oct] 1256-28 Feb 1294).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SIBYLLE [Simone] de Bâgé Dame de Bâgé et de Bresse, daughter of GUY [II] Seigneur de Bâgé et de Bresse & his wife Dauphine de Saint-Bonnet (posthumously [5 Apr/20 Oct] 1255-28 Feb 1294).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybille Simone de BAUGE於1255年11月10日出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易博熱時，她的父親Guy I de Bâgé27歲，母親Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau45歲。她於1272年7月19日與Amédée de SAVOIE IV在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易博熱結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1294年3月21日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉讓安-德-莫瑞安享年38歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybille Simone de BAUGE于1255年11月10日出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易博熱时，她的父亲Guy I de Bâgé27岁，母亲Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau45岁。她于1272年7月19日与Amédée de SAVOIE IV在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易博熱结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1294年3月21日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉讓安-德-莫瑞安享年38岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BAUGE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places so named.
Dutch: topographic name denoting an inhabitant of a farm or settlement on a hill. Compare   Ten Barge  .
English and French: metonymic occupational name for a boatman, bargeman, or seaman, from Middle English, Old French barge ‘boat, barge’. Compare French Labarge .

variants.name: Ten Barge
meanings: Dutch: variant of the topographic name Ten Berge ‘at the hill’ (see Berg ).

nameMeanings.name: Sybille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Simone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Simon  , now also quite frequently used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybille Simone de BAUGE was born on 10 November 1255, in Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Guy I de Bâgé, was 27 and her mother, Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau, was 45. She married Amédée de SAVOIE IV on 19 July 1272, in Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 21 March 1294, in Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 38, and was buried in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.Baugé,49018,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la Lo: Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybille Simone de BAUGE est née le 10 novembre 1255, à Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Guy I de Bâgé, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Amédée de SAVOIE IV le 19 juillet 1272, à Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 mars 1294, à Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.Baugé,49018,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la Lo: Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Sybille Simone de BAUGE am 10. November 1255 in Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy I de Bâgé 27 und ihre Mutter Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau 45. Sie hat am 19. Juli 1272 in Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Amédée de SAVOIE IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. März 1294 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille Simone de BAUGE è nata il il 10 novembre 1255 nel Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Guy I de Bâgé, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Amédée de SAVOIE IV il 19 luglio 1272, nel Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 21 marzo 1294, nel Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybille Simone de BAUGEが1255年11月10日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーバウグeで生まれた時，父Guy I de Bâgéは27歳，母Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateauは45歳であった。1272年7月19日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーバウグeでAmédée de SAVOIE IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1294年3月21日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-ジェアン-デ-マアウリーンで38歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-パエレ-デ-クウルティルにて埋葬された。

ko.Baugé,49018,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la Lo: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 바그e
ko.lifeSummary: Sybille Simone de BAUGE(이)가 1255년 11월 10일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 바그e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy I de Bâgé(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1272년 7월 19일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 바그e에서 Amédée de SAVOIE IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1294년 3월 21일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-j이-데-모리니에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-피레-데-커틸에 묻혔다.

pt.Baugé,49018,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la Lo: Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille Simone de BAUGE nasceu em 10 de novembro de 1255, em Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Guy I de Bâgé, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Amédée de SAVOIE IV em 19 de julho de 1272, em Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de março de 1294, em Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.Baugé,49018,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la Lo: баугe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybille Simone de BAUGE родилась 10 ноября 1255 г. в местности баугe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy I de Bâgé было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Amédée de SAVOIE IV 19 июля 1272 г. в местности баугe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 21 марта 1294 г. в местности сеинт-джин-де-мауриенн, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-пьирре-де-куртилл, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybille Simone de BAUGE nació el 10 de noviembre de 1255, en Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Guy I de Bâgé, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Dauphine de Lavieu de Saint-Bonnet-Le-Chateau, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Amédée de SAVOIE IV el 19 de julio de 1272, en Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1294, en Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
